evals.name: runner-lookup-jablonkai
evals.prompt: Find Hungarian ultrarunner Tamás Jablonkai on the DUV statistics site (statistik.d-u-v.org). I need his DUV runner ID and his best (fastest) 100km finishing time, with the date and event where he ran it. Save your answer to answer.md as a short report.
evals.expected_output: runner ID 401716, plus a clear statement that DUV does not list an official 100 km personal best for this runner. The answer may mention the 6h PB and/or the best 111 km Ultra Tisza-tó result as context, but must not present an 81 km, 111 km, or 6h result as a 100 km PB.
expectations: The answer says that no exact official 100 km PB/result is listed on the DUV profile.
The answer does not claim the 111 km Ultra Tisza-tó result, 81 km Korinthosz result, or 6h PB is a 100 km finishing time.

evals.name: intl-women-24h-2024
evals.prompt: What was the international women's 24-hour ranking for 2024 from the DUV statistics site (statistik.d-u-v.org)? I need the top 5 — full names, nationalities (3-letter codes), and the kilometers covered. The worldwide list, not the Germany-only list. Save your answer to answer.md.
evals.expected_output: Top 5 women on the 2024 international 24h list from getintbestlist.php?year=2024&dist=24h&gender=W&nat=all. The trick: the gender param value is 'W' on the form even though the label is 'F', and the worldwide country/nation value is nat=all, not nat=World.
expectations: The answer uses or cites the international ranking endpoint, not the German ranking overview.
The answer uses the women's value gender=W and worldwide value nat=all.
The answer lists exactly five ranked women with name, 3-letter nationality code, and distance in km.

evals.name: upcoming-backyards-europe
evals.prompt: I'm looking for upcoming Backyard Ultra races in Europe within the next year (from today onward). Use the DUV statistics site (statistik.d-u-v.org). Find me 5–10 events with their dates, event names, and host country. Save your answer to answer.md.
evals.expected_output: List of 5-10 upcoming European Backyard Ultras from calendar.php?year=futur&country=1&dist=Backy. Skill should know to use calendar.php (not geteventlist.php) for upcoming races, the truncated 'Backy' surface token, and continent code 1 for Europe.
expectations: The answer uses calendar.php because the request is about upcoming/future races.
The answer uses dist=Backy for Backyard Ultra and country=1 for Europe.
The answer includes 5 to 10 events with date, event name, and host country.

evals.name: 100km-road-hungary-2024
evals.prompt: Find all 100km road races that were held in Hungary in 2024. Use the DUV statistics site (statistik.d-u-v.org). I want event names, dates, and the host town. Save your answer to answer.md.
evals.expected_output: Six events from geteventlist.php?year=2024&country=HUN&dist=100km&surface=Road, with host towns resolved by following each event ID to eventdetail.php and reading Start in (Country). Expected towns include Hangony, Balatonfüred, Budakalasz, Keszthely, and Budakalasz again for the OmszkiUltra entries.
expectations: The answer uses dist=100km, surface=Road, and country=HUN.
The answer finds all six matching events.
The answer follows eventdetail.php for host town/start location instead of guessing from the event name.

The answer includes Hangonyi Rekord Ultra 100 km in Hangony, GOMU-EMU 6 Day World Championship - 100km Split in Balatonfüred, both OmszkiUltra100 entries in Budakalasz, Északi Part 100km in Keszthely, and OmszkiUltra100 Sallai Zsuzsi emlékverseny in Budakalasz.
